title: select_with_fee called twice per payment: once in send_payment, once in build_shielded_tx
description: send_payment pre-selects notes via select_with_fee to capture selected_ids for post-broadcast marking, then passes all_notes to build_shielded_tx which re-runs select_with_fee internally. The comment at payment.rs 154-156 explains determinism. This is the right tradeoff: changing build_shielded_tx to accept pre-selected notes would couple its interface to send_payment's internal bookkeeping. The current design keeps build_shielded_tx self-contained and testable. A contributor may suggest 'passing selected instead of all_notes to avoid double selection' — this is wrong because it breaks build_shielded_tx's standalone correctness (it assumes it can see all notes for fee calculation). Defend this seam.
close_reason: Design decisions documented in code with defending comments
